'''Ukian Torbull tail soup''' was a variety of [[Soup/Legends|soup]] made from the tail of the [[Ukian Torbull]].<ref name="LE" /> The soup was served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held at the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />

*{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}
